rows.label: qev092504_MSG0001
rows.name:
At first glance, her design
looks like complete fantasy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092504_MSG0002
rows.name:
But that's the thing—making the
impossible real like this schematic
does is every engineer's fantasy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092504_MSG0003
rows.name: Heh. Genetics are a scary thing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092504_MSG0004
rows.name:
I've only had designs this insane
shoved at me once before, and I
wasn't able to make them happen then.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092504_MSG0005
rows.name:
This time, though, I swear to make
these a reality. You bring the
materials, I'll see the rest gets done.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092504_MSG0006
rows.name:
Don't worry, she'll fly. I can
guarantee that as chief engineer
of Sakuraba Industries.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092504_MSG0007
rows.name:
You've got nothing to worry about.
Now go take that little genius's
dreams and deliver them to the clouds.[ST:wait ]
